channel.title: Smokin' and Grillin' with AB Page
channel.description: Smokin' and Grillin' with AB Page

item.title: Ready for the Oven!
item.description: The dish is prepped and ready to bake. Are you making your dressing today or waiting until tomorrow? Tips for timing and preparation for a perfect meal.

media:content.media:title: Ready for the Oven!
media:content.media:description: The dish is prepped and ready to bake. Are you making your dressing today or waiting until tomorrow? Tips for timing and preparation for a perfect meal.
media:content.media:credit: Smokin' and Grillin' with AB Page

item.title: Cooking the Way I Was Raised
item.description: Discover the cooking lessons and recipes passed down from my family. A heartfelt look at how these traditions shaped my approach in the kitchen.

media:content.media:title: Cooking the Way I Was Raised
media:content.media:description: Discover the cooking lessons and recipes passed down from my family. A heartfelt look at how these traditions shaped my approach in the kitchen.
media:content.media:credit: Smokin' and Grillin' with AB Page

item.title: Crispy Sesame Chicken Bites
item.description: Learn how to make flavorful, crispy sesame chicken bites at home. A simple recipe for a tasty snack or meal that’s sure to please.

media:content.media:title: Crispy Sesame Chicken Bites
media:content.media:description: Learn how to make flavorful, crispy sesame chicken bites at home. A simple recipe for a tasty snack or meal that’s sure to please.
media:content.media:credit: Smokin' and Grillin' with AB Page

item.title: How to Make a 7UP Cake
item.description: Learn an easy way to bake a moist, fluffy 7UP cake. A simple recipe that combines classic flavors for a sweet, crowd-pleasing dessert.

media:content.media:title: How to Make a 7UP Cake
media:content.media:description: Learn an easy way to bake a moist, fluffy 7UP cake. A simple recipe that combines classic flavors for a sweet, crowd-pleasing dessert.
media:content.media:credit: Smokin' and Grillin' with AB Page

item.title: Creamy Shrimp Chowder Recipe
item.description: Make a comforting, flavorful shrimp chowder in no time. This easy recipe delivers rich, creamy goodness perfect for a cozy meal.

media:content.media:title: Creamy Shrimp Chowder Recipe
media:content.media:description: Make a comforting, flavorful shrimp chowder in no time. This easy recipe delivers rich, creamy goodness perfect for a cozy meal.
media:content.media:credit: Smokin' and Grillin' with AB Page

item.title: Stop Overcooking Pasta
item.description: Learn the key to perfectly al dente pasta every time. Simple tips to avoid mushy noodles and elevate your homemade dishes.

media:content.media:title: Stop Overcooking Pasta
media:content.media:description: Learn the key to perfectly al dente pasta every time. Simple tips to avoid mushy noodles and elevate your homemade dishes.
media:content.media:credit: Smokin' and Grillin' with AB Page

item.title: Mouthwatering BBQ Green Beans
item.description: Learn how to make BBQ green beans with smoky, savory flavor. A simple recipe to elevate your meals and impress at any cookout.

media:content.media:title: Mouthwatering BBQ Green Beans
media:content.media:description: Learn how to make BBQ green beans with smoky, savory flavor. A simple recipe to elevate your meals and impress at any cookout.
media:content.media:credit: Smokin' and Grillin' with AB Page

item.title: Sweet Twist on Onion & Bacon
item.description: Discover how a touch of sweetness transforms classic onion and bacon into a savory-sweet snack. Simple tips for an easy flavor upgrade.

media:content.media:title: Sweet Twist on Onion & Bacon
media:content.media:description: Discover how a touch of sweetness transforms classic onion and bacon into a savory-sweet snack. Simple tips for an easy flavor upgrade.
media:content.media:credit: Smokin' and Grillin' with AB Page
